text.title: MCP Server Development Guide Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Does a public MCP server already exist for the service?

conclusion.verdict: use the public server (`npx -y @package/name`); do not duplicate

branch.question: Does the service need interactive OAuth?

conclusion.verdict: not an MCP fit — build a token-refresh job outside MCP, then expose a service-account credential via MCP

text.example: public_exists=false → oauth_interactive=false (service-account JSON) → deployment=local → stdio transport; ≤20 tools.
